text: Do you have a published equality action plan, and which characteristics does it cover?
help_why: Equality action plans move from voluntary (Apr 2026) to mandatory (~Spring 2027) — the report-to-act shift.

text: Can you group your workforce into categories of equal value (by skills, effort, responsibility and conditions)?
help_why: The EU Pay Transparency Directive's core requirement; the #1 readiness blocker for employers.

text: Have you removed salary-history questions from your hiring process?
help_why: Salary-history bans are a likely next UK transparency step and already in the EU directive.

text: Do you include pay or a pay range in job adverts?
help_why: Pay-in-adverts is an EU directive recruitment obligation and a UK direction of travel.

text: Do you run proactive equal-pay audits, and how often?
help_why: Proactive audits are the protection as the burden of proof shifts to employers.

text: Do you use AI tools in pay decisions, and with what governance?
options: No AI use;AI with no formal oversight;AI as decision-support with human oversight;AI with human oversight and bias auditing
help_why: AI-in-reward governance: decision-supporter not decision-maker, with bias monitoring. lumi whitespace.

text: Do you proactively offer guaranteed-hours contracts to variable-hours workers?
options: No;On request only;Yes proactively (after a reference period)
help_why: Employment Rights Act 2025 duty: offer guaranteed hours reflecting actual hours worked.

text: Do you compensate workers for shifts cancelled at short notice?
help_why: ERA 2025 right to compensation for cancelled/curtailed shifts.

text: How much advance notice of shifts do you give?
options: No set notice;Less than 1 week;1-2 weeks;2 or more weeks
help_why: ERA 2025 duty to give reasonable notice of shifts.

text: Do you pay a premium specifically for AI skills?
help_why: The 61%/55% tension: most orgs add AI skills to roles, few yet pay for them.

text: Do you offer paid bereavement leave above the statutory minimum?
options: Statutory only;1-5 days enhanced;5 or more days enhanced
help_why: ERA 2025 introduces a new statutory bereavement leave right; enhancement is the differentiator.

text: Does your occupational sick pay apply from day one (no waiting days)?
help_why: Reflects the new day-one SSP baseline under the ERA (waiting days removed).
